product.description:
- Nano Skinz SG Ceramide Nano+ Serum with Squalane & Pentavitin- 5x Ceramide Radiant Complex, Smoother Skin

- With 5X Ceramides and potent ingredients like Squalane, Pentavitin, and Raybloc, it elevates hydration, skin-barrier, and anti-aging powers.

- Ceracare Ceramide

- Reduce Moisture Loss by 168% in 4 weeks
- Clinical studies show that Ceracare MLS AC45 is a superior choice for maintaining skin hydration in just 4 weeks.

- SQUALENE
- Achieves 4x Reduction in Roughness in 4 Weeks
- Clinical studies show that Squalane reduces skin roughness by 4x in just 4 weeks compared to baseline
- PENTAVITIN

- Enhanced Skin Barrier Function in Just 7 Days
- 73% of users reported their skin felt more hydrated and looked healthier after 1 month of consistent use.

- RAYBLOC
- Unmatched 24-Hour Hydration and UV Protection
- Users reported enhanced skin protection and reduced sensitivity to UV exposure after using Raybloc

- MORE PROVEN ACTIVE INGREDIENTS
- Hydration & Moisture
- Aqua, Glycerin, 2,3-Butanediol, Ethylhexylglycerin.

- Skin Barrier Strengthening
- Ceramide NP, Ceramide NG, Ceramide AG, Ceramide AP, Ceramide EOP, Squalane, Cholesterol.

- Brightening & Antioxidants
- Chlorella Vulgaris Powder, Laminaria Digitata Extract, Saccharide Isomerate.

- Functional & Delivery Enhancers
- Hydrogenated Lecithin, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Xylitol, Xanthan Gum, Diatomaceous Earth.

- Other Ingredients
- Phenoxyethanol, Tetrasodium EDTA.

metaData.Key Information: Sunscreen gel that is gentle and smooth as it was born from skin care. Water based and lightweight, with high UV protection ratio, no special cleansing required (can be easily removed with soap). It can be used on the face, neck, arms and feet, and also protects against UV stains and freckles. Can also be used as a makeup foundation. Formulated with hyaluronic acid, super hyaluronic acid, and collagen (moisturizing ingredient). For face and body [How to use] Take an appropriate amount of hand and spread it evenly on your skin. Less quantity will not provide enough sun protection. It is ideal for frequent recoloring Also, after swimming or sweating, please keep water out and recolor each time. To remove, rinse with soap or facial cream.

metaData.Ingredients: Water (Aqua), Butyloctyl Salicylate, Isopropyl Myristate, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Neopentyl Glycol Diheptanoate, Ethylhexyl Isononanoate, Alcohol Denat., Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Butylene Glycol, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Propanediol, Silica, Methyl Methacrylate Crosspolymer, Stearic Acid, Polyglyceryl-6 Polyhydroxystearate, Hydrogenated Olive Oil Unsaponifiables, Artemisia Capillaris Extract, Polyglyceryl-4 Diisostearate/Polyhydroxystearate/Sebacate, Stearalkonium Hectorite, Undecane, 1,2-Hexanediol, Polyglyceryl-6 Polyricinoleate, Hydroxyacetophenone, Tridecane, Polyglycerin-6, Isopropyl Titanium Triisostearate, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Ascorbyl Palmitate (Vitamin C Derivative), Iron Oxides (CI 77492, CI 77491, CI 77499)
metaData.Key Information: It offers broad-spectrum SPF protection in a lightweight, fluid texture. It helps shield skin from harmful UV rays while keeping it hydrated and comfortable. The formula absorbs quickly without leaving a white cast, making it ideal for daily use.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Cleanse and tone your face as usual.
2. Dispense an appropriate amount and spread evenly over the face and neck as the last step of your morning skincare routine.
3. Blend well to ensure even coverage.
4. Reapply every 2–3 hours when exposed to sunlight for continuous protection.

product.description: External use only. Avoid contact with eyes and clothing. Do not use on borken, damaged or diseased skin. If irritation develops, discontinue use. Store below 30°c . May stain clothing.

metaData.Ingredients: ACTIVE INGREDIENTS: Homosalate (10% W/W), Octyl Salicylate (5% W/W), Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane (4% W/W), Octocrylene (8% W/W). CONTAINS: Benzyl Alcohol, Phenoxyethanol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Milk Product.
metaData.Key Information: Enjoy the Great Outdoors confident that you have Broad Spectrum protection from the Sun’s harmful UVA/UVB rays. Enriched with Goat’s Milk. This high protection sunscreen lotion is water resistant for 4 hours and can aid in the prevention of premature aging of skin exposed to the sun, and may assist in the prevention of some skin cancers. This high protection sunscreen lotion is water resistant for 4 hours and can aid in the prevention of premature aging of skin exposed to the sun, and may assist in the prevention of some skin cancers.
metaData.Preparation: Apply liberally and evenly to all unprotected areas of the skin 20 minutes prior to sun exposure. Re-apply every 2 hours, especially after exercise, perspiration, swimming and towel drying. Always wear protective clothing, hats and eyewear when exposed to the sun and avoid prolonged exposure to the sun. On an average sized adult, one cupped adult hand (30ml to 40ml) of sunscreen should be applied. This is the equivalent of at least 1 teaspoon for each limb, front and back of the body and half a teaspoon for the face, neck and ears.
metaData.Storage Information: Store unused product in a cool dry place. Avoid direct exposure to heat or sunlight.
